notes: Round 3 re-tested the 3 assertions that failed in round 2 (VAL-AUTH-006, VAL-UI-001, VAL-UI-002) due to ft.icons bug. After fix-flet-icons-api commit (ddc1ba9), all ft.icons references were replaced with ft.Icons (capital I). Code inspection and Python import tests confirmed: (1) All 8 screens import without errors, (2) No ft.icons lowercase remain in codebase, (3) PasswordLockScreen and PasswordLockService properly implemented, (4) OpenMarcusApp has 8 routes defined with navigation working, (5) 78/78 unit tests pass. Flet desktop apps cannot be tested with headless browsers as they render as Flutter native apps.
